title: Poker Pack
description: Add a deck of 54 cards to play with your friends.
body:
This is a datapack that adds a deck of 54 cards (including jokers) to play classic games like poker or blackjack with your friends.

![All Cards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3e35f8351ab05f5260d87f223e5446fba717ec.png)

**How to get cards:**

You can obtain the cards by placing a paper in the stonecutter and then selecting the card you want.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a174a53b3e68fc171850432dfb7fd8f250fb62.png)

_You can obtain the poker chips by placing a copper nugget in the stonecutter._

**Commands:**

You can get a bundle with all the cards using any of the following commands:

- /function pokerpack:deck
- /loot give @s loot pokerpack:deck
  
**Installation:**

The resource pack also works as a datapack, so you need to install it in both your resource packs folder and your world's datapacks folder.

Notes:
- OptiFine is **not** required.
- It has a spanish translation.
